name: solobois-settings-sync
description: Sync settings, keybindings, and extensions for Antigravity via GitHub Gist

soloboisSettingsSync.gistId.description: GitHub Gist ID for settings sync. Leave empty to auto-create on first upload.

soloboisSettingsSync.autoSyncOnStartup.description: Automatically download and apply settings from Gist on startup. Requires soloboisSettingsSync.autoSync=true.

soloboisSettingsSync.autoSync.description: Master toggle for automatic sync behavior. When false, startup sync and auto-upload file watchers are disabled (manual commands still work).

soloboisSettingsSync.autoUploadOnChange.description: Automatically upload settings to Gist when local files change. Requires soloboisSettingsSync.autoSync=true.

soloboisSettingsSync.autoUploadDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before auto-uploading after a change is detected.

soloboisSettingsSync.syncPreview.description: Show a sync preview (diff summary) before applying downloaded changes.

soloboisSettingsSync.confirmExtensionSyn.description: Ask for confirmation before installing or uninstalling extensions during download.

soloboisSettingsSync.gistTrust.description: Per-Gist trust setting. Untrusted gists block extension install/uninstall during download. Example: { "<gistId>": "trusted" }

soloboisSettingsSync.ignoredSettings.description: Settings keys to ignore during sync (glob patterns supported). Example: ["terminal.integrated.profiles.*"]. Common secret-key examples are included by default.

soloboisSettingsSync.removeExtensions.description: Automatically uninstall local extensions that are not in the remote list.

soloboisSettingsSync.publicGist.description: Create new sync Gists as Public (visible to anyone). Defaults to Private for security.

soloboisSettingsSync.authoritativeDownlo.description: When enabled, remote settings.json is applied as authoritative. Local keys not present in remote are removed.

soloboisSettingsSync.syncAntigravityConf.description: Sync Antigravity-only config files (antigravity.json, browserAllowlist.txt). If not explicitly set, runtime default follows platform: true on Antigravity, false on VS Code.

soloboisSettingsSync.ignoredExtensions.description: List of extension IDs to ignore during sync. Example: ["ms-vscode.cpptools"]

soloboisSettingsSync.profiles.description: Stored sync profiles by name. Each profile stores gistId, ignoredSettings, and ignoredExtensions.

soloboisSettingsSync.currentProfile.description: The name of the currently active sync profile.

soloboisSettingsSync.privateExtensions.description: List of private/unlisted extensions. Each entry has id, version, optional vsixUrl, syncGistKey, and note.

vsixUrl.description: Direct VSIX download URL for automatic install

syncGistKey.description: Gist file key for Tier 1 private VSIX sync payload

soloboisSettingsSync.privateExtensionsAu.description: Show a confirmation picker before applying auto-detected private extension changes.
How auto-detect updates privateExtensions[].version when an entry already exists.

soloboisSettingsSync.privateExtensionsAu.default: Auto-detected as private (not found in public marketplaces). Add VSIX URL or upload to Gist for auto-install.
soloboisSettingsSync.privateExtensionsAu.description: Note text appended/used when private extensions are auto-detected.

soloboisSettingsSync.userDataDir.description: Override the user data directory path (where settings.json and keybindings.json live). Supports ~/. Leave empty for auto-detection. Example: ~/data/User for LinuxServer.io code-server Docker.

soloboisSettingsSync.extensionsDir.description: Override the extensions directory path. Supports ~/. Leave empty for auto-detection. Example: ~/extensions for LinuxServer.io code-server Docker.

soloboisSettingsSync.additionalFiles.description: Additional files to include in the Gist sync (e.g. formatter configs, dotfiles). Supports ~/. Each file is stored in the Gist as 'additional__<basename>'. Example: ["~/data/eclipse-formatter.xml"]

enumDescriptions: Auto-detect: uses Docker paths if container signals are found, otherwise uses standard OS paths.
Always use LinuxServer.io code-server Docker paths (~/data/User, ~/extensions). Use this if auto-detection fails inside a container.
Always use standard OS paths. Skips Docker path detection entirely.
soloboisSettingsSync.pathStrategy.description: Controls how settings and extensions directory paths are resolved. Set to 'docker' if running inside a LinuxServer.io code-server container and sync is not working.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
